eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Ingham; Eaton; Clinton, MI; at 8:44 AM on AUG 8, 2019 Effective until 12:44 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test of the Tri-County EAS system for notifying Ingham, Clinton, and Eaton Counties. This is only a test.
